name: modal-sandbox
description: Run coding tasks safely in Modal Sandboxes through the modal-sandbox-sdk CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Run coding tasks in isolated Modal Sandboxes.
interface.longDescription: Guides coding agents through safe discovery, authenticated execution, persistent files, and reusable Modal Sandbox workflows using the modal-sandbox-sdk CLI.
defaultPrompt: Run this task in an isolated Modal Sandbox.
Use a Modal volume to persist these workspace files.
Start a reusable Modal Sandbox for this coding task.
